containerVersion.name: CRBOX Analytics
containerVersion.description: CRBOX GTM container — updated May 2026 (v3). 1 built-in variable (Event), 25 DLV variables, 35 Custom Event triggers, 36 tags (1 GA4 Configuration + 35 GA4 Event tags). Covers all 25 analytics.js events including 17 portal events. All parameter names match the 24 registered GA4 custom dimensions. Import via Admin → Import Container → Existing Workspace → Replace.

variable.name: GA4 Measurement ID

tag.notes: Fires on All Pages. GA4 Measurement ID is G-B5BPHFRR18 — already set.
